channel.title: 番剧每日新闻RSS
channel.description: 自动聚合：新番、定档、PV、STAFF、CAST、延期资讯 | Auto-updated anime news aggregator

item.title: [动画] Anime News Network BAKI-DOU: Invincible Samurai 动画 Debuts Part 2 on Netflix on June 18
item.description: All 12 episodes stream worldwide exclusively on Netflix ― The staff for BAKI-DOU: The Invincible Samurai, the anime of Keisuke Itagaki's first Baki-Dou manga, announced on Wednesday that its second... | 来源: ANN | 原文: BAKI-DOU: The Invincible Samurai Anime Debuts Part 2 on Netflix on June 18

item.title: [动画][CAST] Anime News Network Pokémon Horizons 动画 Casts Kis-My-Ft2的 Toshiya Miyata
item.description: Miyata voices leader of "Shining Oceans" in anime's 141st episode on June 19 ― The staff of the Pokémon Horizons anime revealed on Wednesday that boy band Kis-My-Ft2 member and voice actor Toshiya... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Pokémon Horizons Anime Casts Kis-My-Ft2's Toshiya Miyata

item.title: [动画][续作] Anime News Network Dorohedoro 动画 Gets 3rd 季度
item.description: Director Yuichiro Hayashi shared commemorative illustration of Haru following 2nd season finale ― The staff for the second anime season based on Q Hayashida's Dorohedoro manga announced on Wednesday... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Dorohedoro Anime Gets 3rd Season

item.title: [续作] MyAnimeList 第三 季度 Dorohedoro Announced
item.description: The 11th and final episode of Dorohedoro Season 2 revealed on Thursday that the third season is in production. The official website also released an illustration (pictured) drawn by the series'... | 来源: MAL | 原文: Third Season of 'Dorohedoro' Announced
